ai_summary: ADOR WELDING LIMITED has officially set Thursday, July 16, 2026, as the Record Date for its final dividend of Rs. 23 per equity share (230% of face value) for Fiscal Year 2025-26. This routine regulatory filing under SEBI regulations confirms eligibility for shareholders to receive the dividend, representing a direct financial distribution to investors. No red flags are apparent, as this is a standard update to a previously recommended corporate action.
